title: helenium grandiflorum
intro: Helenium grandiflorum, also known as the Sneezeweed or American Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and pain. The health benefits of Helenium grandiflorum include its potential to relieve respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, and to reduce fever. Helenium grandiflorum is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and can be used externally to treat skin irritations and wounds, or internally to relieve respiratory issues.
